notes: Base model (non-DSP, non-DSP+D variant). All signal and control I/O use pluggable terminal block (Phoenix/euroblock) connectors — no XLR, no Speakon, no Ethernet/RJ45 (those are DSP+D-only). Audio inputs accept balanced analog only (base model has no AES/EBU digital input, though the product page mentions 'analog and digital input' — this refers to DSP variants sharing the same Phoenix footprint). Speaker output connector part number Phoenix PC 5/8-STF1-7.62 (1777891) confirmed from DM Music and search results. Input connector part Phoenix MC 1.5/12-ST-3.81 (1803675) confirmed. IEC C20 inlet on device classified as iec-c19 (the matching cable connector). Primary source is the DM Music retailer page; manufacturer product page corroborates key details. Confidence is medium because connector details come from a retailer page rather than an official Powersoft spec PDF (PDFs returned as binary).

ports.name: Signal Input MAIN
ports.note: 12-pin Phoenix MC 1.5/12-ST-3.81 (3.81mm pitch pluggable terminal block); balanced analog input for all 8 channels (3 pins per channel)

ports.name: Signal Input AUX
ports.note: 12-pin Phoenix MC 1.5/12-ST-3.81 (3.81mm pitch pluggable terminal block); switchable auxiliary balanced analog input for all 8 channels

ports.name: Speaker Output 1–4
ports.note: 8-pin Phoenix PC 5/8-STF1-7.62 (7.62mm pitch); covers channels 1–4; supports lo-Z and 70V/100V hi-Z

ports.name: Speaker Output 5–8
ports.note: 8-pin Phoenix PC 5/8-STF1-7.62 (7.62mm pitch); covers channels 5–8; supports lo-Z and 70V/100V hi-Z

ports.name: Alarm 1
ports.note: 12-pin Phoenix MC 1.5/12-ST-3.81; configurable NC/NO alarm contacts per channel (channels 1–4 or per-channel grouping)

ports.name: Alarm 2
ports.note: 12-pin Phoenix MC 1.5/12-ST-3.81; configurable NC/NO alarm contacts per channel

ports.name: Remote Line/AUX Switch + PWS Out
ports.note: 4-pin Phoenix MC 1.5/4-ST-3.81; remote main/aux input switching and 24VDC (0.2A max) power supply output

ports.name: Remote On/Off + Aux Voltage
ports.note: 4-pin Phoenix MC 1.5/4-ST-3.81; remote on/off switching and auxiliary voltage

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: IEC C20 male inlet on device (accepts IEC C19 female detachable cord); 20A max; 90–264V AC universal input
